name: Casper Reardon
abstract: Casper Reardon (April 15, 1907 – March 9, 1941) was an American classical and jazz harpist. He studied classical harp at the Curtis Institute of Music and went on to play for the Philadelphia Orchestra and the Cincinnati Symphony Orchestra.

about_quotes.speaker: Al Hall
about_quotes.evidence: I made an initial album with Victor Borge when he first came from with Paul Barry's orchestra Europe, and there were two basses and I was made the first We played some Brahms; "All the Things You Are" and Casper Reardon bass, 60 strings playing

about_quotes.speaker: Chauncey Morehouse
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Do you remember Casper Reardon? [INTERVIEWEE] Casper Reardon, sure.
